SDTM

Variable Name Domain Variable Label
AE DOMAIN Adverse Event
CE DOMAIN Clinical Events
CM DOMAIN Concomitant Medication
DA DOMAIN Drug Accountablity
DD DOMAIN Death Details
DM DOMAIN Demographic
DS DOMAIN Disposition
DV DOMAIN Protocol Deviation
EC DOMAIN Exposure as Collected
EG DOMAIN ECG Test Results
EX DOMAIN Exposure
FA DOMAIN Findings About
HO DOMAIN Healthcare Encounters
IE DOMAIN Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met
LB DOMAIN Laboratory Test Results
MB DOMAIN Microbiology Specimen
MH DOMAIN Medical Histroy
ML DOMAIN Meal Data
MO DOMAIN Morphology
PC DOMAIN Pharmacokinetics Concentrations
PE DOMAIN Physical Examination
PP DOMAIN Pharmacokinetics Parameters
PR DOMAIN Procedure
QS DOMAIN Questionnaire
RS DOMAIN Disease Response and Clinical Classification
SC DOMAIN Subject Characteristics
SE DOMAIN Subject Elements
SR DOMAIN Skin Response
SS DOMAIN Subject Status
SU DOMAIN Substance Use
SV DOMAIN Subject Visits
TA DOMAIN Trial Arms
TE DOMAIN Trial Elements
TI DOMAIN Trial Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria
TS DOMAIN Trial Summary
TV DOMAIN Trial Visits
VS DOMAIN Vital Signs
SUBJID ALL Subject Identifier
STUDYID ALL Study Identifier
USUBJID ALL Unique Subject Identifier
EPOCH ALL Epoch
ARMCD ALL Planned Arm Code
ARM ALL Description of Planned Arm
ACTARMCD ALL Actual Arm Code
ACTARM ALL Description of Atual Arm
VISITNUM ALL Visit Number
VISIT ALL Visit Name
ELEMENT ALL Description of Element
ETCD ALL Element Code
AEACN AE Action Taken with Study Treatment
AEREL AE Causality
AEGRPID AE Group ID
AEREFID AE Reference ID
AESPID AE Sponsor-Defined Identifier
AELNKID AE Link ID
AETERM AE Reported Term for the Adverse Event
AELLT AE Lowest Lever Term
AEDECOD AE Dictionary-Derived Term
AEHLT AE High Level Term
AEHLGT AE High Level Group Term
AEBODSYS AE Body Systerm or Organ Class
AESOC AE Primary System Organ Class
AESER AE Serious Event
AEOUT AE Outcome of Adverse Event
AESCONG AE Congenital Anomaly or Birth Defect
AESDISAB AE Persistor Signif Disability/Incapacity
AESDTH AE Results in Death
AESHOSP AE Requires or Prolongs Hospitalization
AESLIFE AE Is Life Threatening
AESMIE AE Other Medically Important Serious Event
AECONTRT AE Concomitant or Additional Treatment Given
AETOXGR AE Standard Toxicity Grade
AESTDTC AE Start Date/Time of Adverse Event
AEENDTC AE End Date/Time of Adverse Event
AESTRF AE Start Relative to Reference Period
AEENRF AE End Relative to Reference Period
AESEQ AE Sequence Number
AELLTCD AE Lowest Level Term Code
AEPTCD AE Preferred Term Code
AEHLTCD AE High Level Term Code
AEHLGTCD AE High Level Group Term Code
AEBDSYCD AE Body System or Organ Class Code
AESOCCD AE Primary System Organ Code Class
AESTDY AE Study Day of Start of Adverse Event
AEENDY AE Study Day of ENd of Adverse Event
CESTDTC CE Start Date/Time of Clinical Event
CEENDTC CE End Date/Time of Clinical Event
CEDECOD CE Dictionary-Derived Term
CETERM CE Reported Term for Clinical Event
CECAT CE Category of Clinical Event
CESCAT CE Subcategory of Clinical Event
CESEV CE Severity/Intensity
CESER CE Seriousness Indicator
CEACN CE Action Taken with Study Treatment
CEREL CE Causality
CEOUT CE Outcome of Clinical Event
CEGRPID CE Group ID
CEREFID CE Reference ID
CESPID CE Sponsor-Defined Identifier
CEEVAL CE Evaluator (e.g., Investigator, Sponsor)
CEBODSYS CE Body System or Organ Class
CMSEQ CM Sequence Number
CMREFID CM Reference ID
CMSPID CM Sponsor-Defined Identifier
CMTRT CM Reported Name of Drug, Med, or Therapy
CMDECOD CM Standardized Medication Name
CMCAT CM Category for Medication
CMPRESP CM CM Pre-Specified
CMOCCUR CM CM Occurance
CMINDC CM Indication
CMDOSTXT CM Dose Description
CMDOSU CM Dose Units
CMDOSFRM CM Dose Form
CMDOSFRQ CM Dosing Frequency per Interval
CMROUTE CM Route of Administration (e.g. ORAL, INTRAVENOUS)
CMLOC CM Location of Dose Adminstration
CMLAT CM Laterality (e.g. LEFT, RIGHT)
CMSTDTC CM Start Date/Time of Medication
CMENDTC CM End Date/Time of Medication
CMSTDY CM Study Day of Start of Medication
CMENDY CM Study Day of End of Medication
CMSTRF CM Start Relative to Reference Period
CMENRF CM End Relative to Reference Period
DDTERM DD Reported Term for Death
DDDECOD DD Dictionary-Derived Term for Death
DDDTC DD Date/Time of Death
DDSTRESC DD Result or Finding as Collected
DDCAT DD Category for Death Details
DDSCAT DD Subcategory for Death Details
DDGRPID DD Group ID
DDREFID DD Reference ID
DDSPID DD Sponsor-Defined Identifier
RFSTDTC DM Subject Reference Start Date/Time
RFENDTC DM Subject Reference End Date/Time
RFXSTDTC DM Date/Time of First Study Treatment
RFXENDTC DM Date/Time of Last Study Treatment
RFICDTC DM Date/Time of Informed Consent
RFPENDTC DM Date/Time of End of Participation
DTHDTC DM Date/Time of Death
DTHFL DM Subject Death Flag
SITEID DM Study Site Identifier
BRTHDTC DM Date/Time of Birth
AGE DM Age
AGEU DM Age Units
SEX DM Sex
RACE DM Race
ETHNIC DM Ethnicity
COUNTRY DM Country
DSTERM DS Reported Term for Disposition Event
DSDECOD DS Standardized Disposition Term
DSCAT DS Category for Disposition Event
DSSCAT DS Subcategory for Disposition Event
DSSTDTC DS Start Date/Time of Disposition Event
DSENDTC DS End Date/Time of Disposition Event
DSSTDY DS Study Day of Disposition Event
DSOUT DS Outcome of Disposition Event
DSREASND DS Reason for Disposition Event
DSGRPID DS Group ID
DSREFID DS Reference ID
DSSPID DS Sponsor-Defined Identifier
DVTERM DV Reported Protocol Deviation Term
DVDECOD DV Standardized Protocol Deviation Term
DVCAT DV Category of Protocol Deviation
DVSCAT DV Subcategory of Protocol Deviation
DVSTDTC DV Start Date/Time of Protocol Deviation
DVENDTC DV End Date/Time of Protocol Deviation
DVSTDY DV Study Day of Protocol Deviation
DVGRPID DV Group ID
DVREFID DV Reference ID
DVSPID DV Sponsor-Defined Identifier
DVEVAL DV Evaluator
ECSEQ EC Sequence Number
ECTRT EC Name of Treatment
ECMOOD EC Mood (e.g. SCHEDULED, PERFORMED)
ECCAT EC Category of Treatment
ECPRESP EC Pre-specified
ECOCCUR EC Occurrence
ECDOSE EC Dose
ECDOSTXT EC Dose Description
ECDOSU EC Dose Units (for ECDOSE, ECDOSTOT, or ECDOSTXT)
ECDOSFRM EC Dose Form (e.g. TABLET, LOTION)
ECDOSFRQ EC Dosing Frequency per Interval (e.g. Q2H, QD, BID)
ECDOSTOT EC Total Daily Dose
ECROUTE EC Route of Adminstration (e.g. ORAL, INTRAVENOUS)
ECFAST EC Fasting Status
ECSTDTC EC Start Date/Time of Treatment
ECENDTC EC End Date/Time of Treatment
ECSTDY EC Study Day of Start of Treatment
ECENDY EC Study Day og End of Treatment
EXSEQ EX Sequence Number
EXTRT EX Name of Treatment
EXCAT EX Category of Treatment
EXDOSE EX Dose
EXDOSTXT EX Dose Description
EXDOSU EX Dose Units
EXDOSFRM EX Dose Form
EXDOSFRQ EX Dosing Frequency per Interval (e.g. Q2H, QD, BID)
EXROUTE EX Route of Administration (e.g. ORAL, INTRAVENOUS)
EXFAST EX Fasting Status
EXSTDTC EX Start Date/Time of Treatment
EXENDTC EX End Date/Time of Treatment
EXSTDY EX Study Day of Start of Treatment
EXENDY EX Study Day of End of Treatment
FATEST FA Findings About Test Name
FATESTCD FA Findings About Test Short Name
FAOBJ FA Object of the Observation
FACAT FA Category for Findings About
FASCAT FA Subcategory for Findings About
FAORRES FA Result or Finding as Collected
FASTRESC FA Character Result/Finding in Standard Format
FASTRESN FA Numeric Result/Finding in Standard Units
FASTAT FA Completion Status
FAREASND FA Reason Not Done
FADTC FA Date/Time of Observation/Collection
FASTDY FA Study Day of Observation
FAGRPID FA Group ID
FAREFID FA Reference ID
FASPID FA Sponsor-Defined Identifier
IEREFID IE Reference ID
IETESTCD IE Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name
IETEST IE Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion
IECAT IE Inclusion/Exclusion Category
IEORRES IE I/E Criterion Original Result
IESTRESC IE I/E Criterion Result in Std Format
IESEQ IE Sequence Number
LBSEQ LB Sequence Number
LBGRPID LB Group ID
LBREFID LB Specimen ID
LBSPID LB Sponsor-Defined Identifier
LBTESTCD LB Lab Test or Examination Short Name (e.g. ALT, LDH)
LBTEST LB Lab Test or Examination Name
LBCAT LB Category for Lab Test (e.g. HEMATOLOGY, URINALYSIS, CHEMISTRY)
LBSCAT LB Subcategory for Lab Test (e.g. COAGULATON, LIVER FUNCTION, ELECTOLYTES)
LBORRES LB Result or Finding in Original Units
LBORRESU LB Original Units (e.g. g/L)
LBORNRLO LB Reference Range Lower Limit in Orig Unit
LBORNRHI LB Reference Range Upper Limit in Orig Unit
LBSTRESC LB Character Result/Finding in Std Format
LBSTRESN LB Numeric Result/Finding in Standard Units
LBSTRESU LB Standard Units (for LBSTRESC or LBSTRESN)
LBSTNRLO LB Reference Range Lower Limit-Std Unit
LBSTNRHI LB Reference Range Upper Limit-Std Unit
LBSTNRC LB Reference Range for Char Result-Std Unit
LBNRIND LB Reference Range Indicator
LBSTAT LB Completion Status
LBREASND LB Reason Test Not Done
LBNAM LB Vendor Name
LBLOINC LB LOINC Code
LBSPEC LB Specimen Type (e.g. SERUM, PLASMA, URINE)
LBMETHOD LB Method of Test or Examination (e.g. EIA (Enzyme Immunoassay), ELECTROPHORESIS, DIPSTICK)
LBLOBXFL LB Last Observation Before Exposure Flag
LBBLFL LB Baseline Flag
LBFAST LB Fasting Status
LBDTC LB Date/Time of Specimen
LBDY LB Study Day of Specimen Collection
LBEVLINT LB Evaluation Interval
MBTEST MB Microbiology Test Name
MBTESTCD MB Microbiology Test Short Name
MBORRES MB Result or Finding as Collected
MBSTRESC MB Character Result/Finding in Standard Format
MBSTRESN MB Numeric Result/Finding in Standard Units
MBSTAT MB Completion Status
MBREASND MB Reason Not Done
MBCAT MB Category for Microbiology Specimen
MBSCAT MB Subcategory for Microbiology Specimen
MBSPEC MB Specimen Material Type
MBSPCCND MB Specimen Condition
MBDTC MB Date/Time of Specimen Collection
MBSTDY MB Study Day of Specimen Collection
MBMETHOD MB Method of Test or Examination
MBGRPID MB Group ID
MBREFID MB Reference ID
MBSPID MB Sponsor-Defined Identifier
MHSEQ MH Sequence Number
MHREFID MH Reference ID
MHSPID MH Sponsor-Defined Identifier
MHLNKID MH Link ID
MHTERM MH Reported Term for the Medical History
MHLLT MH Lowest Level Term
MHLLTCD MH Lowest Level Term Code
MHDECOD MH Dictionary-Derived Term
MHPTCD MH Preferred Term Code
MHHLT MH High Level Term
MHHLTCD MH High Level Term Code
MHHLGT MH High Level Group Term

MHCAT MH Category for Medical History (e.g. CARDIAC, GENERAL)
MHBODSYS MH Body System or Organ Class
MHBDSYCD MH Body System or Organ Class Code
MHTOXGR MH Standard Toxicity Grade

MHENDTC MH End Date/Time of Medical Histroy Event

MOSTRESN MO Numeric Result/Finding in Standard Units

MOREASND MO Reason Not Done
MODTC MO Date/Time of Morphology Observation
MOSTDY MO Study Day of Observation
MOCAT MO Category for Morphology Observation
MOSCAT MO Subcategory for Morphology Observation
MOMETHOD MO Method of Morphology Observation
MOLOC MO Location Used for Morphology Observation
MOGRPID MO Group ID
MOREFID MO Reference ID
MOSPID MO Sponsor-Defined Identifier

SEENDTC SE End Date/Time of Element

TAETORD SE Planned Order of Element within Arm
SSTEST SS Subject Status Test Name
SSTESTCD SS Subject Status Test Short Name
SSORRES SS Result or Finding as Collected
SSSTRESC SS Character Result/Finding in Standard Format
SSSTRESN SS Numeric Result/Finding in Standard Units
SSDTC SS Date/Time of Status Assessment

SSREASND SS Reason Not Done
SSEVAL SS Evaluator
SSGRPID SS Group ID

SVSEQ SV Sequence Number
SVPRESP SV Pre-Specified
SVOCCUR SV Occurrence
SVSTDTC SV Start Date/Time of Visit
SVENDTC SV End Date/Time of Visit
SVSTDY SV Study Day of Start of Visit
SVENDY SV Study Day of End of Visit
SVEPCHGI SV Epi/Pandemic Change Indicator
SVCNTMOD SV Contact Mode
TAETORD TA Planned Order of Element within Arm
TABRANCH TA Branch (e.g. randomization to DRUG X)
TATRANS TA Transition Rule (e.g. Responders go to washout)
TESTRL TE Rule for Start of Element
TEENRL TE Rule for End of Element
TEDUR TE Planned Duration of Element
IETESTCD TI Incl/Excl Criterion Short Name
IETEST TI Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion
IECAT TI Inclusion/Exclusion Category
TIVERS TI Protocol Criteria
TSSEQ TS Sequence Number
TSGRPID TS Group ID
TSPARMCD TS Trial Summary Parameter Short Name (e.g. AGEMIN, AGEMAX)
TSPARM TS Trial Summary Parameter (e.g. Planned Maximum Age of Subjects)
TSVAL TS Parameter Value
TSVALNF TS Parameter Null Flavor
TSVALCD TS Parameter Value Code
TSVCDREF TS Name of the Reference Terminology (e.g. CDISC, SNOMED, ISO 8601)
TSVCDVER TS Version of the Reference Terminology
TVSTRL TV Visit Start Rule
TVENRL TV Visit End Rule
VSSEQ VS Sequence Number
VSREFID VS Reference ID
VSTESTCD VS Vital Signs Test Short Name (e.g. SYSBP, DIABP)
VSTEST VS Vital Signs Test Name (e.g. Systolic Blood Pressure, Diastolic Blood Pressure)
VSPOS VS Vital Signs Position of Subject (e.g. SUPINE, STANDING, SITTING)
VSORRES VS Result or Finding in Original Units
VSORRESU VS Original Units (e.g. IN, LB, BEATS/MIN)
VSSTRESC VS Character Result/Finding In Std Format
VSSTRESN VS Numeric Result/Finding in Standard Units
VSSTRESU VS Standard Units
VSSTAT VS Completion Status
VSREASND VS Reason Not Performed (e.g. BROKEN EQUIPMENT, SUBJECT REFUSED)
VSLOBXFL VS Last Observation Before Exposure Flag
VSBLFL VS Baseline Flag
VSDTC VS Date/Time of Measurements
VSDY VS Study Day of Vital Signs
